author: nottherealtar
install_msg: Arc Raiders cog installed! Use `[p]arc` for rotations and `[p]arc key <name>` for key locations. Set up auto-posts with `[p]arc notify channel add #channel` then `[p]arc notify enable`.
name: ArcRaiders
short: Track Arc Raiders map rotations, events, and key locations
description: Arc Raiders map rotation tracker powered by the MetaForge live event schedule, with automatic change notifications, key lookup, and a fallback UTC table if the API is down.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores guild settings for auto-update and notification channels. No personal user data is stored.
